tessera.vmap(
                self.base_model.forecast,
                in_axes=(0, None, None),  # Vary initial state, same forcings
                out_axes=0
            )

tessera.vmap(
            self.perturbation_network,
            in_axes=(None, 0),  # Same state, different modes
            out_axes=0
        )
